title: potentilla elatior
intro: Potentilla elatior, also known as tall cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Potentilla elatior can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for its potential medicinal and therapeutic uses.
